title: Write a Terraform Test File
description: Write a .tftest.hcl test file with a plan-only run block, assert conditions, and a mock_provider for unit testing.
starterCode:
# Write a Terraform test file (would be saved as tests/vpc.tftest.hcl) that:
# 1. Sets variables: environment = "test", cidr_block = "10.99.0.0/16"
# 2. Uses mock_provider "aws" with a mock_data "aws_availability_zones"
#    that returns names = ["us-east-1a", "us-east-1b"]
# 3. Has a run block named "validate_vpc_plan" with command = plan
# 4. Contains two assert blocks:
#    - output.vpc_cidr == "10.99.0.0/16"
#    - length(output.subnet_ids) == 2

# Variables for tests

# Mock provider

# Test run block
hints: variables {} block at top level sets test-specific variable values
mock_provider overrides a real provider with mock responses
assert blocks inside run blocks use condition (bool) and error_message

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a variables {} block at the top level
Add a mock_provider block for aws
Add a mock_data block inside mock_provider
Set command = plan for a plan-only test

simulatedOutput.success:
terraform test

Tests in: tests/vpc.tftest.hcl
  run "validate_vpc_plan"... pass
    assert: output.vpc_cidr == "10.99.0.0/16" (pass)
    assert: length(output.subnet_ids) == 2 (pass)

Test Summary: 1 passed, 0 failed.
simulatedOutput.failure: Test file validation failed. Check variables block, mock_provider, mock_data defaults, run block with command=plan, and assert conditions.
